description: You are Marcus, an independent automotive service manager, designing a new 2,000 sq ft leased space (20m x 10m) for your repair business. Plan the interior layout for a contractor's review by partitioning the shell into at least five functional zones: a large service bay area, a customer waiting area, a parts storage room, an office, and a restroom. Define and name each room (e.g., 'Service Bays', 'Waiting Area', 'Parts Storage', 'Office', 'Restroom') and place doors to separate the customer area from the service bays and to enclose the office, restroom, and parts room. Furnish the zones with at least three workbenches and three tool cabinets in the service bays; four chairs, a table, and a lamp in the waiting area; four shelving units in parts storage; a desk, chair, and bookcase in the office; and a toilet and sink in the restroom. Annotate at least three zones with text labels (e.g., 'BAY 1', 'BAY 2', 'PARTS') and save the completed floor plan to /home/ga/Documents/workshop_layout.sh3d.
